description: GeoServer edge CVE — OGC filter evaluation RCE (CVE-2024-36401) via unsafe commons-jxpath expression evaluation. Detection-only: version/endpoint fingerprint + BENIGN arithmetic-echo marker (no command execution).

geoserver_eval_rce_2024.description: CVE-2024-36401 — GeoServer evaluates OGC filter property names as commons-jxpath expressions, allowing unauthenticated RCE via WFS/WMS requests. Detection uses (1) the /geoserver/web/ version fingerprint and (2) a BENIGN arithmetic expression (1337*1338=1788906) — never a command-execution payload (Rule 5).

probes.description: GeoServer web admin present (200 with GeoServer branding / version) confirms the product/version family affected by CVE-2024-36401. Read-only version fingerprint.

Benign arithmetic-echo probe — if the jxpath evaluator is vulnerable, the response reflects the EVALUATED product 1788906 instead of the literal string, confirming expression evaluation without executing any OS command. Non-destructive detection marker only.
